# جامعة أفريقيا الفرنسية العربية – فرع سوريا (UPAFA Syria)

> University offering accredited Bachelor's, Master's, and PhD programs in Syria via in-person and distance learning, affiliated with Université Panafricaine Franco-Arabe (Mali).

UPAFA Syria is the Syrian branch of Université Panafricaine Franco-Arabe. The site is fully Arabic (RTL), serves prospective and current students, and covers admissions, programs, faculties, tuition, scholarships (Mofadla), publications, and conferences.

## Pages

- [الرئيسية / Home](/): University overview and announcements.
- [عن الجامعة / About](/about): History, mission, and accreditation.
- [البرامج / Programs](/programs): All academic programs by level.
- [البكالوريوس / Bachelor](/programs/bachelor): Bachelor admission and registration.
- [الماجستير / Master's](/programs/masters): Master's programs and distance learning.
- [الدكتوراه / PhD](/programs/phd): Doctoral programs.
- [الكليات / Faculties](/faculties): Faculty and department listings.
- [الرسوم الدراسية / Tuition](/tuition): Tuition fee policies.
- [جدول الرسوم / Tuition Fees](/tuition-fees): Detailed fee schedule.
- [الأسئلة الشائعة / FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions.
- [المنشورات / Publications](/publications): Academic publications.
- [المؤتمرات / Conferences](/conferences): Conferences and events.
- [اتصل بنا / Contact](/contact): Address, phone, email.
- [المفاضلة / Mofadla](/mofadla): Scholarship and admission competition.
- [التسجيل في المفاضلة / Mofadla Apply](/mofadla/apply): Application form.
- [البوابة / Portal](/portal): Student and teacher portal login.

## Optional

- [أخبار الجامعة](/news/university-news)
- [أخبار الامتحانات](/news/exams-news)
